name: DevFeed
description: Agrégateur RSS pour développeurs — Dev.to style, dark mode, DuckDuckGo search

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src https://api.rss2json.com https://duckduckgo.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; script-src 'self'
